title: limnanthes floccosa subsp. pumila
intro: Limnanthes floccosa subsp. pumila, also known as the dwarf meadow foam, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Limnanthaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Limnanthes floccosa subsp. pumila include its potential to treat skin conditions, wounds, and respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or ointments to utilize its medicinal properties.
